---
title: "master_thesis_site_deepdive"
author: "Savannah K. Miller"
date: "2026-06-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r, working directory and packages}



# data import and database management 
# reading files, reshaping data, and efficient data handling 

#######################################################

library(readxl) # import excel spreadsheets
library(data.table) #quick manipulation of large datasets
library(stringr) # text and string processing 
library(lubridate) # data and time handling 
library(writexl) # exports editted databases into excel files

#######################################################

# General data science workflow 
# Collection of packages for data manipulation and plotting

#######################################################

library(tidyverse)

#######################################################

#Statistical analyses and mixed models 
# Hypothesis testing, summaries, and model fitting 

#######################################################

library(gt) # displaying formatted tables for statistics 
library(rstatix) # statistical tests and assumption checking
library(lmerTest) # p-values and tests for lme4 models 
library(lme4) # linear and generalized mixed-effects models
library(ggeffects) # predicted values and marginal effects 

#######################################################

# Data visualization 
# Plot creation, figure assembly, and publication formatting 

#######################################################

library(patchwork) #combine ggplots into multi-panel figures
library(cowplot) # figure arrangement and plot annotations
library(rcartocolor) # color palettes
library(ggh4x) # advanced ggplot extensions
library(scales) # axis labels, formatting, and scaling 
library(ggridges)

#######################################################
# Spatial data and mapping 
# GIS data handling and map visualization
#######################################################

library(sf) #spatial vector data
library(ggmap) #basemaps and geographic visualization
library(ggspatial) #spatial annotations and map elements
library(leaflet) #interactive web maps

#######################################################

#Tables and report outputs 
# Interactive tables and report presentation 

#######################################################

library(reactable) #interactive tables for reports

#######################################################
# R markdown and document rendering 
# PDF generation and LaTeX support 
#######################################################

library(tinytex) #LaTeX engine for PDF knitting
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r, load the datasheet}

master_thesis <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\master_thesis.csv")


# Reassign factors to appropriate variables 

master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field = as.Date(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field, 
                                             format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
master_thesis$Date.removed.from.field = as.Date(master_thesis$Date.removed.from.field,            
                                                format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
master_thesis$Study.Phase <- factor(master_thesis$Study.Phase, levels = c("M1", "M2", "M3", "M4", "M5", "M6","M7", "M8", "M9", "M10", "M11", "M12"))
master_thesis$Site <- as.factor(master_thesis$Site)
master_thesis$Tran <- as.factor(master_thesis$Tran)
master_thesis$Dist <- as.factor(master_thesis$Dist)
master_thesis$Replicate<- as.factor(master_thesis$Replicate)
master_thesis$Year<- as.factor(master_thesis$Year)
master_thesis$Flux <- as.numeric(master_thesis$Flux)
master_thesis$Hydro_Period <- factor(master_thesis$Hydro_Period, levels = c("Late_Dry\n(Months 1-3)", "Tran\n(Months 4-6)", "Wet\n(Months 7-9)", "Growth\n(Months 10-12)"))
master_thesis$marsh_edge_type <- as.factor(master_thesis$marsh_edge_type)
master_thesis$marsh_orientation <- as.factor(master_thesis$marsh_orientation)
master_thesis$Marsh_Area <- as.factor(master_thesis$Marsh_Area)


```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r, site B}


# Filter to just Buck's Landing first
buckslanding_data <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(Site == "Buck's Landing")

# Summarize by Transect and Study.Phase instead of by Site
buckslanding_summary <- buckslanding_data %>%
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Study.Phase
  ) %>%
summarise(
  mean_flux = mean(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE),
  se_flux = sd(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(Flux >= 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
  .groups = "drop"
)

ggplot(
  buckslanding_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Buck's Landing",
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)) 
  )
```

```{r}


b_raincloud = ggplot(
  buckslanding_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Study.Phase,
    fill = Study.Phase
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Buck's Landing",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
b_raincloud

braincloud_phase = ggplot(
  buckslanding_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Study.Phase,
    fill = Study.Phase
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Buck's Landing",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
braincloud_phase


braincloud_dist = ggplot(
  buckslanding_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Dist,
    fill = Dist
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Buck's Landing",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
braincloud_dist


braincloud_dist_time = ggplot(
  buckslanding_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Dist,
    fill = Dist
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Study.Phase) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Buck's Landing",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
braincloud_dist_time

```


```{r, site C}


# Filter to just Buck's Landing first
cm_data <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(Site == "CorteMadera")

# Summarize by Transect and Study.Phase instead of by Site
cm_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Study.Phase
  ) %>%
summarise(
  mean_flux = mean(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE),
  se_flux = sd(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(Flux >= 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
  .groups = "drop"
)

ggplot(
  cm_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)) 
  )

```


```{r}


cm_raincloud = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Study.Phase,
    fill = Study.Phase
  )
) +  
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
cm_raincloud

cmraincloud_tran = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Study.Phase,
    fill = Study.Phase
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
cmraincloud_tran
```

```{r}
# basic

basic_fluxcm = ggplot(cm_data, aes(x = Flux)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Distribution at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)),
    y = "Count"
  )
basic_fluxcm

# flux through time 

phase_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  phase_summary,
  aes(x = Study.Phase, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux Through Time at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "Negative flux values set to zero",
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# flux by hydro_period 

hydro_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Hydro_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  hydro_summary,
  aes(x = Hydro_Period, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Hydrologic Period at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Hydrologic Period",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# flux by distance 

dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Dist) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  dist_summary,
  aes(x = Dist, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Distance from Marsh Edge at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# flux by distance and hydro

dist_hydro_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Dist, Hydro_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  dist_hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Hydro_Period,
    group = Hydro_Period
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Distance x Hydrologic Period at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Hydrologic Period"
  )

# flux through time by distance 

time_dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Dist, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    group = 1
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Dist, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Through Time by Distance at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# flux through time by transect 

tran_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  tran_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Through Time by Transect at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Transect"
  )

# raw flux and distance 

ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = as.numeric(as.character(Dist)),
    y = Flux
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Raw Flux vs Distance at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# once elevation is complete 

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Elevation,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Elevation at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Elevation",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
#   )

# once veg is cleaned and entered 

# one_site <- one_site %>%
#   mutate(
#     Veg_Structure = Percent_Cover * Avg_Height
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Percent_Cover,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Percent Cover at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Percent Vegetation Cover",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Veg_Structure,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Vegetation Structure at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Vegetation Structure Index (Cover x Height)",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
#   )
```

```{r, for b data}

# basic

basic_fluxb = ggplot(buckslanding_data, aes(x = Flux)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Distribution at", "Buck's Landing"),
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^3)),
    y = "Count"
  )
basic_fluxb

# flux through time 

phase_summaryb <- buckslanding_data %>%
  group_by(Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  phase_summaryb,
  aes(x = Study.Phase, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux Through Time at", "Buck's Landing"),
    subtitle = "Negative flux values set to zero",
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# flux by hydro_period 

hydro_summary <- buckslanding_data %>%
  group_by(Hydro_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  hydro_summary,
  aes(x = Hydro_Period, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Hydrologic Period at", "Buck's Landing"),
    x = "Hydrologic Period",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# flux by distance 

dist_summary <- buckslanding_data %>%
  group_by(Dist) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  dist_summary,
  aes(x = Dist, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Distance from Marsh Edge at", "Buck's Landing"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# flux by distance and hydro

dist_hydro_summary <- buckslanding_data %>%
  group_by(Dist, Hydro_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  dist_hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Hydro_Period,
    group = Hydro_Period
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Distance x Hydrologic Period at", "Buck's Landing"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Hydrologic Period"
  )

# flux through time by distance 

time_dist_summary <- buckslanding_data %>%
  group_by(Dist, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    group = 1
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Dist, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Through Time by Distance at", "Buck's Landing"),
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# flux through time by transect 

tran_summary <- buckslanding_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  tran_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Through Time by Transect at", "Buck's Landing"),
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^3)),
    color = "Transect"
  )

# raw flux and distance 

ggplot(
  buckslanding_data,
  aes(
    x = as.numeric(as.character(Dist)),
    y = Flux
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Raw Flux vs Distance at", "Buck's Landing"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
  )

# once elevation is complete 

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Elevation,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Elevation at", "Buck's Landing"),
#     x = "Elevation",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
#   )

# once veg is cleaned and entered 

# one_site <- one_site %>%
#   mutate(
#     Veg_Structure = Percent_Cover * Avg_Height
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Percent_Cover,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Percent Cover at", "Buck's Landing"),
#     x = "Percent Vegetation Cover",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Veg_Structure,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Vegetation Structure at", "Buck's Landing"),
#     x = "Vegetation Structure Index (Cover x Height)",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^3))
#   )

```






```{r}

# for stats/regression stuff later 

lm_dist <- lm(
  Flux ~ as.numeric(as.character(Dist)),
  data = cm_data
)

summary(lm_dist)

dist_lm_table <- tibble(
  Site = "Corte Madera",
  Model = "Flux ~ Distance",
  R_squared = summary(lm_dist)$r.squared,
  Adj_R_squared = summary(lm_dist)$adj.r.squared,
  p_value = coef(summary(lm_dist))[2, 4]
)

dist_lm_table %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Exploratory Linear Regression Summary"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(R_squared, Adj_R_squared, p_value),
    decimals = 4
  )
